n: Chapter 10.12: The Short Road and the Long

steps.t: Rahâzi is on the eastern side of her mother's lodge in Iridír.
Your companions throughout the village of Iridír may welcome the gift of pillows, or they may not.
Your task complete, you can now rest for the night in the village of Iridír. Sleeping mats for this purpose can be found on the western side of the lo…
